title: Mailchimp vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Moosend email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and ratings to find the best fit for your business.
h1: Mailchimp vs Moosend: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Both Mailchimp and Moosend offer freemium email marketing platforms with automation and analytics, but they differ in pricing structure, feature sets, and user reviews. This comparison helps you understand which tool aligns better with your business needs, whether you're a complete beginner or an established small business.

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, landing pages, A/B testing, segmentation
comparison_table.tool_b: Unlimited emails, automation workflows, landing pages, subscription forms, A/B testing, real-time analytics

choose_a_if: You need ecommerce integration and cart abandonment features for online stores
You prefer a well-established platform with extensive third-party integrations and resources
You're willing to accept lower customer satisfaction ratings in exchange for brand recognition
choose_b_if: You want unlimited emails on the free plan and lower starting prices for paid tiers
Customer support and positive user reviews are priorities for your decision
You need automation workflows and real-time analytics without significant investment

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your priorities. Mailchimp excels in brand recognition and ecommerce features, while Moosend offers superior pricing, more generous free plans, and significantly higher customer satisfaction ratings. Moosend scores 4.7 on G2 versus Mailchimp's 4.3, and vastly outperforms on Trustpilot (4.4 vs 1.5).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is more affordable overall. It starts at $9/month compared to Mailchimp's $13/month, and offers 1,000 free subscribers with unlimited emails versus Mailchimp's 500 subscribers. For cost-conscious businesses, Moosend delivers better value at every tier.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching is straightforward. Both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and email templates. Most migrations take minimal time, though you'll need to reconfigure automations and integrations in your new platform. Both tools provide import functionality to facilitate the transition.
